releases.description: Adds the Beta updates setting so users can opt into beta builds while still receiving stable updates, plus hero detail screen refinements.

releases.description: Update screen now shows each available release separately, supports GitHub-style release body text, and keeps update downloads inside the app.

releases.description: Hero profile redesign, roster updates, app update flow improvements, home screen updates, Discord card, icon and splash polish, in app updates.
